name: Charlie Murphy
blurb: He gained national fame as a writer and cast member on Comedy Centrals Chappelles Show, especially the True Hollywood Stories sketches recounting his encounters with Rick James and Prince.
bio: Charlie Murphy was an American stand-up comedian, actor and writer, and the older brother of Eddie Murphy. He gained national fame as a writer and cast member on Comedy Centrals Chappelles Show, especially the True Hollywood Stories sketches recounting his encounters with Rick James and Prince. He later toured as a headlining stand-up and released the special I Will Not Apologize.

timeline.ev: Born July 12 in Brooklyn, New York
Enlisted in the US Navy, served six years
First major film role as Gusto in CB4
Joined Chappelles Show as writer and performer
Joins Chappelle's Show as writer and cast member
Co-writes brother Eddie Murphy's film Norbit
Released stand-up special I Will Not Apologize
Comedy Central special Charlie Murphy: I Will Not Apologize

accolades: Breakout fame from Chappelles Show True Hollywood Stories sketches
Writer and breakout cast member of Chappelle's Show (2003-2006)
Author of memoir The Making of a Stand-Up Guy (2009, Simon & Schuster)
